feat.name: Saving Slash
feat.text: You quickly whirl your blade, trying to deflect enough momentum to avoid the worst of the attack. Attempt a DC 15 flat check. If you succeed, the attack becomes a normal hit, instead of a critical hit.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.

feat.trigger: An opponent critically hits you with a melee attack.
